subcodes.title: Words to Ethel Rosenberg and Laura Clifford Barney, spoken on 1904-05-23
subcodes.first_line: Abdu'l-Bahá said we should speak in the language of heaven -- for there is a language of the spirit… When we pray to God a feeling fills our hearts
subcodes.subjects: @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @language and the structure of reality, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcendence; unknowability of God
